lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਮਨ ਰੁਚੈ ॥
lines.translit: har ke naam kee man ruchai |
lines.english: My mind is filled with yearning for the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਚਲਤ ਪ੍ਰਾਨੀ ਪਤਿਤ ਉਧਰੇ ਮੁਚੈ ॥
lines.translit: sant maarag chalat praanee patit udhare muchai |
lines.english: Walking on the path of the Saints, millions of mortal sinners have been saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਅਨੰਦ ਪੂਰਨ ਜਲਤ ਛਾਤੀ ਬੁਝੈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kott saant anand pooran jalat chhaatee bujhai | rahaau |
lines.english: I am totally filled with tranquility and bliss; the burning desire within has been quenched. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਧਿਆਨ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਹਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸੁਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal dhiaan bheetar ghatt ghatteh suaamee sujhai |
lines.english: Meditating on His Lotus Feet deep within, one realizes the Lord and Master in each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇਨੁ ਜਨ ਕੀ ਲਗੀ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਅਨਿਕ ਤੀਰਥ ਸੁਚੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ren jan kee lagee masatak anik teerath suchai |1|
lines.english: One who applies the dust of the feet of the humble to his forehead, is purified, as if he has bathed at countless sacred shrines. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਨਿ ਦੇਵ ਅਪਾਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਜਮੁ ਨਹੀ ਲੁਝੈ ॥੨॥੭॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: saran dev apaar naanak bahur jam nahee lujhai |2|7|15|
lines.english: In the Sanctuary of the Divine, Infinite Lord, Nanak shall never again be tortured by the Messenger of Death. ||2||7||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਦਾਰਾ ਛੰਤ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: kedaaraa chhant mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Kaydaaraa Chhant, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰਗੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਆ ਸੰਤਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: maarag prabh kaa har keea santan sang jaataa |
lines.english: The Lord God has created His Path, which is known in the Society of the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mil mere preetam piaariaa | rahaau |
lines.english: Please meet me, O my Dear Beloved. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਮੈ ਸੋ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: poor rahiaa sarabatr mai so purakh bidhaataa |
lines.english: He is All-pervading amongst all, the Architect of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸਰਨੀ ਆਵੈ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਵੈ ਤਿਲੁ ਨਹੀ ਭੰਨੈ ਘਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jo saranee aavai sarab sukh paavai til nahee bhanai ghaaliaa |
lines.english: One who comes to His Sanctuary, finds absolute peace; not even a bit of his work goes unnoticed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਜਾਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: santan sang jaataa purakh bidhaataa ghatt ghatt nadar nihaaliaa |
lines.english: The Creator Lord, the Architect of Destiny, is known in the Society of the Saints; You are seen in each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਿ ਗਾਏ ਸਹਜ ਸੁਭਾਏ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਮਹਾ ਰਸ ਮਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: har gun nidh gaae sehaj subhaae prem mahaa ras maataa |
lines.english: One who sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord, the Treasure of Virtue, is easily, naturally intoxicated with the supreme, sublime essence of divine love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਤੂ ਪੂਰਨ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak daas teree saranaaee too pooran purakh bidhaataa |1|
lines.english: Slave Nanak seeks Your Sanctuary; You are the Perfect Creator Lord, the Architect of Destiny. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਜਨ ਬੇਧਿਆ ਸੇ ਆਨ ਕਤ ਜਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: har prem bhagat jan bedhiaa se aan kat jaahee |
lines.english: The Lord's humble servant is pierced through with loving devotion to Him; where else can he go?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੀਨੁ ਬਿਛੋਹਾ ਨਾ ਸਹੈ ਜਲ ਬਿਨੁ ਮਰਿ ਪਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: meen bichhohaa naa sahai jal bin mar paahee |
lines.english: The fish cannot endure separation, and without water, it will die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਿਉ ਰਹੀਐ ਦੂਖ ਕਿਨਿ ਸਹੀਐ ਚਾਤ੍ਰਿਕ ਬੂੰਦ ਪਿਆਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: har bin kiau raheeai dookh kin saheeai chaatrik boond piaasiaa |
lines.english: Without the Lord, how can I survive? How can I endure the pain? I am like the rainbird, thirsty for the rain-drop.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਿ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਗਾ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਸਭਾਗਾ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: har daras man laagaa dinas sabhaagaa anadin har gun gaahee |
lines.english: My mind is attached to the Blessed Vision of the Lord. Blessed are the nights and days, when I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬ ਰੈਨਿ ਬਿਹਾਵੈ ਚਕਵੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਸੂਰਜ ਕਿਰਣਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kab rain bihaavai chakavee sukh paavai sooraj kiran pragaasiaa |
lines.english: "When will the night pass?," asks the chakvi bird. "I shall find peace only when the rays of the sun shine on me."

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸੁ ਕਹੈ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਕਤ ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਟਿਕਾਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak daas kahai benantee kat har bin praan ttikaahee |2|
lines.english: Slave Nanak utters this prayer; without the Lord, how can the breath of life continue to flow through me? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਜੋ ਰਹਣਾ ਨਰਕੁ ਸੋ ਸਹਣਾ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਮਨੁ ਬੇਧਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: har bin jo rahanaa narak so sahanaa charan kamal man bedhiaa |
lines.english: Those who are without the Lord suffer in hell; my mind is pierced through with the Lord's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸ ਬਿਹੂਨਾ ਸਾਧ ਜਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਟਿਕਣੁ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: daras bihoonaa saadh jan khin ttikan na aavai |
lines.english: Without the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan, the humble, holy person does not find peace, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸ ਬਿਨਾ ਜਿਉ ਦੇਹੁਰੀ ਕਤ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: saas binaa jiau dehuree kat sobhaa paavai |
lines.english: Without the breath, how can the body obtain glory and fame?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿਕ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ਕਤਹੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਨਿਖੇਧਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: har rasik bairaagee naam liv laagee katahu na jaae nikhedhiaa |
lines.english: The Lord is both sensual and unattached; lovingly attune yourself to the Naam, the Name of the Lord. No one can ever deny Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਜਾਇ ਮਿਲਣਾ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਰਹਣਾ ਸੋ ਸੁਖੁ ਅੰਕਿ ਨ ਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: har siau jaae milanaa saadhasang rahanaa so sukh ank na maavai |
lines.english: Go and meet with the Lord, and dwell in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; no one can contain that peace within his being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਹੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਨਹ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: hohu kripaal naanak ke suaamee har charanah sang samaavai |3|
lines.english: Please be kind to me, O Lord and Master of Nanak, that I may merge in You. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜਤ ਖੋਜਤ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਿਲੇ ਹਰਿ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: khojat khojat prabh mile har karunaa dhaare |
lines.english: Searching and searching, I have met with my Lord God, who has showered me with His Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹੀ ਦੋਖ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ਪੂਰਨ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਰੇ ਪਾਵਨ ਬਿਰਦੁ ਬਖਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: nahee dokh beechaare pooran sukh saare paavan birad bakhaaniaa |
lines.english: He does not consider my faults; He has blessed me with Perfect Peace. It is said that it is His Way to purify us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਗੁਣੁ ਨੀਚੁ ਅਨਾਥੁ ਮੈ ਨਹੀ ਦੋਖ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: niragun neech anaath mai nahee dokh beechaare |
lines.english: I am unworthy, a lowly orphan, but He does not even consider my faults.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲੁ ਸੁਨਿ ਅੰਚਲੋੁ ਗਹਿਆ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਪੂਰ ਸਮਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat vachhal sun anchalo gahiaa ghatt ghatt poor samaaniaa |
lines.english: Hearing that He is the Love of His devotees, I have grasped the hem of His robe. He is totally permeating each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰੋੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਹਜ ਸੁਭਾਇਆ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਦੁਖ ਹਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sukh saagaro paaeaa sehaj subhaaeaa janam maran dukh haare |
lines.english: I have found the Lord, the Ocean of Peace, with intuitive ease; the pains of birth and death are gone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੁ ਗਹਿ ਲੀਨੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਅਪਨੇ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਉਰਿ ਹਾਰੇ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: kar geh leene naanak daas apane raam naam ur haare |4|1|
lines.english: Taking him by the hand, the Lord has saved Nanak, His slave; He has woven the garland of His Name into his heart. ||4||1||
